The '''''Rebirth''''' was the personal [[worldcraft]] of [[Procurator of Justice|Imperial Procurator of Justice]] [[Hethrir]]. [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] presented it to him as a reward for the cleansing of [[Firrerre/Legends|Firrerre]].

==History==
Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Hethrir constructed a compound where he established a so-called "school" for [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] children he had kidnapped or captured. Those with potential were ensconced on ''Rebirth'' for indoctrination.<ref name="TEGTC">''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref>

Hethrir, with an [[Force power/Legends|ability]] to [[Force suppression|dampen]] others' Force abilities, would often prevent Non-Humans from demonstrating any Force-ability, consigning them to be sold as slaves. This was done in line with the [[Humanocentrism|Humanocentric]] policies of the Galactic Empire. Those Humans with Force-potential moved up the ranks of the [[Helpers]], [[Proctor (Empire Reborn)|Proctors]] and [[Empire Youth]].

Many of Hethrir's trainees were taken to the temple of the [[Waru]] on [[Crseih Station]] to be "purified." Waru was posing there as a healer, but occasionally killed beings brought for healing, sucking in their strength. Many of the Empire Youth that survived the purification were sent out to infiltrate the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], working covertly to undermine it.

In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], Hethrir arranged for his Proctors to kidnap the New Republic [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] three children [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]] and [[Anakin Solo|Anakin]] while she was on an official state visit on [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Temporarily blocking Leia's ability to sense her children, and using a pressure bomb to incapacitate the children's minders—the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and a local page—Anakin, Jacen, and Jaina Solo as well as the Munto Codru chamberlain's wyrwulf were captured and whisked away by [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]]. They were shipped off planet to Hethrir's worldcraft, while Leia was still being advised to wait for a ransom request.

On his worldcraft, Hethrir told the children their parents were dead and that he would look after them from now on as their [[Hold-Parent|hold-father]]. The children were suspicious, however, and proved remarkably resistant to the "programming" at the school. Hethrir assigned his own son, [[Tigris]], to look after Anakin, and put the twins in with the rest of the imprisoned children, including a Chironian girl, Lusa. The kidnapped children caused much trouble at the station, using the Force to harass the young Proctors.

Though held in separate cells, the Solo twins managed to escape their cells, taking a number of the other children with them. With the aid of a female [[Sand dragon/Legends|sand dragon]] that Jacen communicated with, they escaped the entire compound and hid from the Proctors and Helpers in a swamp. Just as all this was happening, Leia along with Hethrir's former mate [[Rillao]] and Chewbacca arrived on their transport [[Alderaan (yacht)|''Alderaan'']] and rescued the children while detaining the ill-prepared Proctors with the help of the sand dragon.

However, they were too late to rescue Anakin though, for Hethrir had already departed for Crseih Station with a phalanx of Proctors, intending to relaunch the Empire Reborn and sacrifice Anakin in the temple of the Waru. Following close on his heels, the two mothers left the children in the care of Chewbacca, [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and the worldcraft's [[Veubg]] cook [[Grake]].

R2-D2 also programmed Hethrir's worldcraft to make a jump into the [[Codru system]] where it was captured by the New Republic and local [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]] forces. The worldcraft was then sent to a classified safe system where a team of New Republic scientists (including [[Bevel Lemelisk]]) was sent to examine the captured worldcraft of Hethrir in detail, researching to learn more about techniques for engineering and energy management. Some of this research led to technological advances behind the [[New Class Modernization Program|New Class]] starships of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Space Navy]].
